name: Rubrik
description: Monitor Rubrik Security Cloud backup policies, protected infrastructure, and security events for compliance evidence

credentialFields.label: RSC URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Rubrik Security Cloud URL, e.g. mycompany.my.rubrik.com (without https://)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Service account Client ID from RSC Settings > Service Accounts

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Service account Client Secret from RSC Settings > Service Accounts

checks.name: Backup Logs
checks.description: Verifies SLA Domain backup policies are configured with snapshot schedules in Rubrik Security Cloud

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists protected objects and workloads managed by Rubrik Security Cloud for infrastructure inventory evidence

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks for critical and warning events and alerts in Rubrik Security Cloud
